title: Support  - App page Go button
scenario: "Go" button on Support > App page in Poly Studio Mobile app opens the Poly Contact Support URL
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The Poly Contact Support page at https://support.hp.com/contact/product/poly-lens-mobile-app/2101801768/model/2101801771?source=polydropdown opens in the device's default browser.
